response.original_title: [Free 25K [in] ➜] 『((SIDE))』What happens when you have $25,000 in Robinhood?
response.overview: When you have $25,000 in Robinhood 💰, your account may qualify for a Pattern Day Trader (PDT) exemption 📊 if you are using a margin account. 1 ⟡ 888 ⟡ 576 ⟡ 2041 This means you can place unlimited day trades without the usual 4-day trade restriction within 5 business days ⏳.1 ⟡ 888 ⟡ 576 ⟡ 2041 However, you must maintain at least $25,000 in equity at all times1 ⟡ 888 ⟡ 576 ⟡ 2041 ; if it drops below this level, day trading restrictions can apply again 🔒. In a cash account, this rule does not apply, but funds still follow normal settlement periods before reuse ✔️.1 ⟡ 888 ⟡ 576 ⟡ 2041
response.title: [Free 25K [in] ➜] 『((SIDE))』What happens when you have $25,000 in Robinhood?
